li.label: ate my son {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of my own son... What have I become?

li.label: ate my daughter {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of my own daughter... What have I become?

li.label: ate my husband {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of my own husband... My beloved is gone, and I desecrated his body.

li.label: ate my wife {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of my own wife... My beloved is gone, and I desecrated her body.

li.label: ate my fiancé {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of my own fiancé... Our future together, consumed by me.

li.label: ate my fiancée {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of my own fiancée... Our future together, consumed by me.

li.label: ate my lover {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of my beloved... I'll never forget the taste of their flesh.

li.label: ate my brother {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my brother's flesh... My own blood, consumed by me.

li.label: ate my sister {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my sister's flesh... My own blood, consumed by me.

li.label: ate my grandchild {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my grandchild's flesh... The future of my bloodline, consumed by me.

li.label: ate my father {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my father's flesh... The man who raised me, now inside me.

li.label: ate my mother {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my mother's flesh... The woman who gave me life, consumed by me.

li.label: ate my niece {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my niece's flesh... So young, so innocent.

li.label: ate my nephew {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my nephew's flesh... So young, so innocent.

li.label: ate my half-sibling brother {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my half-sibling brother's flesh... My own blood, consumed by me.

li.label: ate my half-sibling sister {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my half-sibling sister's flesh... My own blood, consumed by me.

li.label: ate my aunt {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my aunt's flesh. This is beyond depraved.

li.label: ate my uncle {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my uncle's flesh. This is beyond depraved.

li.label: ate my grandparent {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my grandparent's flesh. The wisdom of ages, consumed by me.

li.label: ate my cousin brother {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my cousin brother's flesh... My own blood, consumed by me.

li.label: ate my cousin sister {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate my cousin sister's flesh... My own blood, consumed by me.

li.label: ate my kin {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of my kin. I've sunk lower than I ever imagined possible.

li.label: ate my friend {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of my own friend... A loyal companion, now a part of me.

li.label: ate my rival {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of my rival... Whatever they did, they didn't deserve this.

li.label: ate my ex-lover {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of someone I once loved. Our past together makes this so much worse.

li.label: ate my ex-husband {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of the man I was once married to. Whatever he did, he didn't deserve this.

li.label: ate my ex-wife {0}'s corpse
li.description: I ate the flesh of the woman I was once married to. Whatever she did, she didn't deserve this.

li.label: ate my rival {0}'s corpse
li.description: I devoured my rival. Good riddance. They were nothing but a nuisance.

li.label: ate my ex-lover {0}'s corpse
li.description: They meant nothing to me anymore. At least their flesh was useful for something.

li.label: ate my ex-husband {0}'s corpse
li.description: He was a waste of space in life. At least in death he's finally provided something useful.

li.label: ate my ex-wife {0}'s corpse
li.description: She was a waste of space in life. At least in death she's finally provided something useful.
